items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• 1. What do you need to buy today?
• 3. Do you have dogs at home?
• 4. Do you sometimes eat French fries?
• 6. When do you like to go downtown?
• 7. What do you prefer to eat for lunch?

items.text: 1. What do you need to buy today?
3. Do you have dogs at home?
4. Do you sometimes eat French fries?

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu quero comprar um vestido novo Eu preciso vende r meu livro
options: I want to buy a newdress I need to sell my book
book my sell to need I newdress a buy to want I
I want to buy a newdress I need to sell my book 3.
You want to buy a newdress I need to sell my book

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu tenho um irmão e duas irmãs Meu nome é John
options: You have one brother and two sister My name is John
John is name My sister two and brother one have I
I have one brother and two sister My name is John
I have one brother and two sister My name is John 3.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu tenho oito primos Muito prazer
options: I have eight cousins Nice to meet you
You have eight cousins Nice to meet you
you meet to Nice cousins eight have I
I have eight cousins Nice to meet you 3.

items.answer: 6. When do you like to go downtown?
7. What do you prefer to eat for lunch?
